000111222333102132030 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  23 = 2 * 3
  30 = 3 * 0
  32 = 3 * 2
  33 = 3 * 3
  011 = 0 * 11
  030 = 0 * 30
  102 = 1 * 02
  132 = 1 * 32
  223 = 2 * 23
  00011 = 00 * 011
  12223 = 12 * 223
  33102 = 33 * 102
  132030 = 132 * 030
  0001112223 = 00011 * 12223
  33102132030 = 33102 * 132030
  000111222333102132030 = 0001112223 * 33102132030
